title: Earle K. Plyler Prize
body: The Earle K. Plyler Prize for Molecular Spectroscopy and Dynamics is a prize that has been awarded annually by the American Physical Society since 1977. The recipient is chosen for "notable contributions to the field of molecular spectroscopy and dynamics". The prize is named after Earle K. Plyler, who was a leading experimenter in the field of infrared spectroscopy; as of 2024 it is valued at $10,000.  The prize is currently sponsored by the AIP Journal of Chemical Physics.
categories: Awards of the American Physical Society
